feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Any lessons learned from connecting SF EC to ADP Workforce Now using SF Integration Center?
entry.content:
The Purpose: we decided to integrate SF EC to ADP Workforce Now using SF Integration Center for US business.
The Challenge: ADP Workforce Now requires data transformations in our CSV export file that cannot be easily built because we do not have an If Then Logic. As a result, we can probably meet the requirements by sending 3 different files that follow different logic.
The question: Is there anyone who has successfully built such an integration using SF Integration Center?
If not, we would look at SAP's CPI capabilities. That's a big gun, though.

entry.title: how to increase bank field name in employee central?
entry.content: We are uploading the bank file in employee central.  However, the maximum bank name allowed in Employee Central is limited to 15 characters. Is there a way to increase the length of the bank names in SF Employee Central?  Very much appreciate the steps to get this done.

entry.title: Global Assignment Automatic Timeslice Creation Issue
entry.content:
During actions Add Global Assignment or End Global Assignment, an automatic timeslice is created on the dependents portlet even before the workflow is approved. This is causing a duplicate timeslice issue when approving the workflow since the similar workflow will also trigger a timeslice creation in the same portlet, which causes an error and blocks the workflow approval.

Are there other customers experiencing the same issue?

I have raised the below influence request to improve the behavior during GA actions to avoid manual deletion of the automatically created timeslice to make way for the one included in the workflow.

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

entry.title: How should the cost center key be defined in Employee Central?
entry.content:
Dear All,

According to the following SAP Help documentation, the SAP recommendation is to create the cost center with Controlling Area Key and Cost Center Key in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central:

  • SAP Help - Replicating Cost Centers from SAP S/4HANA to Employee Central -> Cost Center Key Mapping
  • SAP Help - Integrating SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with SAP Master Data Integration -> Configuring the Integration Object

What are the reasons against the SAP recommendation?

Thanks for the answers and best regards,
Andy

entry.title: Skip workflow for Internal Hire from RCM to EC in Manage Pending Hire
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement where there is a workflow triggered in Employee Central MSS when there is a change like Promotion/Demotion in Employee Central for an employee by managers. This workflow is written using a business rule on Job Information.

However, the same workflow is triggering when an internal candidate is hired as an Internal Hire in manage Pending Hire from Recruiting to EC directly on a job requisition. We don't want the workflow to be triggered in this scenario.

Is there any condition we can add to bifurcate the Manage Pending Hire scenario and EC MSS scenario. Please suggest if you have configured something similar basis your experience.

entry.title: Convert fields to upper case - Report Storie
entry.content: Good afternoon Community, do any of you know how to configure a column in people storie to change from lower case to upper case? I have a report with several fields in lower case, so I need to change these fields to upper case. Thank you very much.

entry.title: Position management- Shared Positions vs Regular
entry.content: Hello Everyone, we are looking into to implement Position management and the question come up if we shall change from Regular position to shared positions. What would be a disadvantage or the impact of it? Thx

entry.title: How to edit Greetings text on homepage in Sap Successfactor?
entry.content: How to edit Greetings text on homepage in Sap Successfactor?

entry.title: date from... in report storie
entry.content:
Hello Community, I hope you are well, any of you know how I can capture the date on which a report runs a report storie report, ie, if I select from July 31 this field can be within the report? how could it be done?

I appreciate the support, greetings

entry.title: Geo-tagging / Geo-Fencing / Phone No. tagging / IMEI tagging during login for preventing malpractice
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Could we trace the location and mobile number used by employees during login to help prevent malpractice in Mobile SuccessFactors?

Specifically, we are interested in tracking:

  • Geo-tagging or Geo-fencing to capture the location of the login.
  • Phone number tagging to identify the number used for login.
  • IMEI tagging to record the device's unique identifier.

These measures will help us ensure that logins are occurring from expected locations and devices, thus preventing potential misuse.

Thank you.

entry.title: Employee should not be able to login into SuccessFactors through multiple device at the same time
entry.content:
Hi Community,

To enhance security and prevent unauthorized access, employees should not be able to log in to SuccessFactors from multiple devices simultaneously.

Please review and implement measures to ensure that concurrent logins from different devices are restricted.

Thank you!

entry.title: Height conversion feasibility in Personal Information Portlet
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have a "Height" field in the Personal Information Portlet. Could we implement a validation rule for this field so that any value entered with a decimal part greater than or equal to .12 is automatically rounded up to the next whole number?

For example:

  • If the entered value is 5.11 feet, it should be accepted as 5.11 feet.
  • If the entered value is 5.12 feet, it should automatically round up and be recorded as 6 feet.

Thank you!

entry.title: Different Languages should not be taken in field in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

When the system language is set to English, fields should only accept input in English and prevent any non-English characters from being entered or pasted.

For example, in the Personal Information Portlet, if the system language is English, the First Name field should only accept English characters and should not allow input in other languages, such as Hindi.

Thank you!

entry.title: Banner/Background Image uploading access to employee
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Can we restrict employee access to the Banner/Background Image settings so that they can only select images from the existing library? Employees should not have the ability to upload or use any images that are not already available in the library.

Thank you!

entry.title: Badge Management: Allow Issuers to View Recipients of Their Badges
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Currently, SuccessFactors allows us to view who has issued badges to us. Could we add an option for badge issuers to view the list of recipients to whom they have given badges?

This feature would help badge issuers track their activity and manage their badge distribution more effectively.

Thank you.

entry.title: Org Chart Navigation: Enable Users to Drill Down and Return to Previous Levels
entry.content:
Hi Community,

In the org chart, users should be able to navigate both up and down levels in a consistent manner. Currently, when clicking on an employee to move up one level, the org chart displays the upper level. However, if users wish to return to the previous level or hide the upper-level view, this functionality is not available.

Could we enhance the org chart navigation so that users can easily drill down to lower levels and also return to higher levels without difficulty?

Thank you!

entry.title: Feasibility of Proxy Access in Mobile SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Is it possible to have proxy access through the SuccessFactors mobile app?

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thank you!

entry.title: In Position, visibility of Higher-Level Positions field should be based on Cluster/Business Unit
entry.content:
Hi Community,

In the "Higher Level Position" field for a position, we need to ensure that only positions relevant to the specific cluster or Business Unit (BU) are visible. Users should not be able to see positions from other clusters or BUs.

For example, when creating a position for a particular BU, the "Higher Level Position" field should only display positions related to that specific BU, excluding positions from other BUs.

Please let us know the feasibility of this restriction.

Thank you!

entry.title: Automatic Expiry of Comp Off Leave Balance After 60 Days
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The Comp Off Leave Balance should automatically lapse and become lapse after its expiry period of 60 days.

Please let us know the feasibility of expired leave balances are no longer displayed.

Thank you!

entry.title: Date . . contains invalid character ,infotype 2 is incorrect in slg1 .
entry.content:
While Integrating  the employee data from SF to S4Hana , for only few employee the errors are popping  in the SLG1 transaction, stating that the the " Date .. contains invalid character and info type 2 is incorrect . Kindly help on the above.

 

Thanks & Regards .
